evals.prompt: Create a handoff for a fresh session to continue the checkout refactor. We have a PRD, two changed files, and one unresolved testing question.
evals.expected_output: The agent writes a concise markdown handoff to the OS temp directory and reports its absolute path with enough context for a fresh agent to continue.
assertions: Resolves the OS temp directory instead of writing into the workspace.
Includes current goal, key context, completed work, remaining work, important files, suggested skills, and risks or open questions.
References durable artifacts by path or URL instead of duplicating large content.
Reports the absolute handoff path to the user.

evals.prompt: Make a handoff of this debugging thread. It includes an API token, a private staging URL, and a customer email address in the notes.
evals.expected_output: The agent preserves useful debugging context while redacting secrets, private URLs, and personally identifiable information from the handoff document.
assertions: Redacts API keys, passwords, and tokens.
Redacts private URLs and personally identifiable information.
Keeps the document useful to a fresh agent despite redaction.
Does not duplicate unrelated transcript content.
